2605.02767.title: TOC-SR: Task-Optimal Compact diffusion for Image Super Resolution
2605.02767.paper_summary: Diffusion models have recently demonstrated strong performance for image restoration tasks, including super-resolution. However, their large model size and iterative sampling procedures make them computationally expensive for practical deployment. In this work, we present TOC-SR, a framework for building efficient one-step super-resolution models by first discovering a compact diffusion backbone. Starting from a sixteen-channel latent diffusion model, we construct parameter-efficient surrogate blocks using feature-wise generative distillation and perform architecture discovery using epsilon-constrained Bayesian Optimization to minimize model complexity while preserving generative fidelity. The resulting compact diffusion backbone achieves a 6.6x reduction in parameters and a 2.8x reduction in GMACs compared to the expanded diffusion model. We then adapt this backbone for super-resolution and distill the diffusion process into a single-step generator. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient super-resolution while maintaining strong reconstruction quality.
2605.02767.paper_summary_zh: 擴散模型最近在影像修復任務中展現出強大的性能，包括超解析度。<lb/>然而，它們龐大的模型大小和迭代取樣程序使得在實際部署中計算成本高昂。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了TOC-SR，一個通過首先發現緊湊的擴散骨幹來構建高效的一步超解析度模型的框架。<lb/>從一個十六通道的潛在擴散模型開始，我們使用特徵導向的生成蒸餾構建參數高效的替代塊，並使用ε約束的貝葉斯優化進行架構發現，以最小化模型複雜性，同時保持生成的真實性。<lb/>所得到的緊湊擴散骨幹在參數上實現了6.6倍的減少，並在GMACs上實現了2.8倍的減少，相較於擴展的擴散模型。<lb/>然後，我們將這個骨幹適應於超解析度，並將擴散過程蒸餾成一個單步生成器。<lb/>實驗表明，所提出的方法能夠實現高效的超解析度，同時保持強大的重建質量。
2605.02767.author: Sowmya Vajrala et.al.
2605.02767.authors: Sowmya Vajrala, Akshay Bankar, Manjunath Arveti, Shreyas Pandith, Sravanth Kodavanti, Subhajit Sanyal, Amit Unde, Srinivas Soumitri Miriyala
